bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, and the opponent’s first offer gives me the minimum utility on every issue. I am targeting my maximum-utility bid while establishing my preferred anchor, especially on the high-weight issues issueA and issueB.

I am targeting a very high utility bid (about 0.98) because it is still the opening phase at t=0.02 and there is no time pressure to make major concessions. The opponent has repeated the same all-valueE offer, which is very low utility for me and shows no concession yet, so I will only make a small move on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid around 0.96 because it is still very early at t=0.04 and there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has repeated the all-valueE bid without conceding, so I will make only a small move on my lowest-weight issues while holding firm on the high-weight issueA and issueB.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.94 because it is still very early in the negotiation and the opponent has not shown any concession, repeatedly offering the lowest-utility values for me. Since there is no evidence yet about their tradeoffs beyond holding firm, I am conceding only on my lower-weight issues while keeping issueA, issueB, and issueC at my best values.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.94 because it is still very early at t=0.08 and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeatedly offering the same low-utility all-valueE bid. Since their behavior gives no evidence of flexibility, I will avoid a large concession while slightly varying my previous offer and conceding only on lower-weight issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early at t=0.10, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueE with no movement, so I will not reward that by conceding on the high-weight issues issueA, issueB, and issueC; I will only soften on lower-weight issueD and issueE while avoiding an exact repeat of my last bid.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.92 because it is still early at t=0.12, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueE, which gives very low utility to me and shows no concession pattern, so I will hold firm on the high-weight issues while varying concessions on the lower-weight issues to avoid repeating my last bid.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still early in the negotiation and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeatedly offering the same all-valueE package. Since my highest-weight issues are issueA, issueB, and issueC, I hold firm there and make only low-weight concessions on issueD and issueE while avoiding an exact repeat of my previous bid.

I am targeting a still-high utility around 0.90 because it is early in the negotiation, and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering the all-valueE bid. Since issueA, issueB, and issueC carry most of my utility, I am holding those at valueA while conceding further only on the lower-weight issues D and E, and I am avoiding an exact repeat of my prior bid.

I am targeting about 0.90 utility, since it is still early at t=0.18 and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering the same all-valueE bid. I will concede only on the lowest-weight issues while holding issueA, issueB, and issueC at my best values, and avoid repeating my previous exact bid.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.88, since it is still early at t=0.20 and the opponent has shown no concession, repeatedly offering the same all-valueE package. I am conceding only on the lower-weight issues D and E while holding firm on the most important issues A, B, and C, and I avoid repeating my previous exact bid.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.88 because it is still early at t=0.22 and the opponent has shown no real concession, repeatedly offering the same all-valueE bid. I will keep firm on the high-weight issues A, B, and C, while conceding further on low-weight issues D and E to test flexibility without sacrificing too much.

I am targeting a high utility of about 0.86 because it is still early at t=0.24, so I should not concede on the high-weight issues A, B, and C yet. The opponent has repeatedly offered all valueE with no concession and sent no messages, so I am only conceding further on the low-weight issues D and E while avoiding repeating my last exact bid.

I am targeting a utility around 0.80: I keep issueA and issueB at my highest values because they are my most important issues, while conceding further on lower-weight issueD and issueE and making a first concession on issueC. The opponent has held completely firm at all valueE offers with no messages, so at t=0.26 I should not capitulate but should start testing a more meaningful tradeoff that is not a repeat of my last bid.

I am targeting a utility around 0.78, conceding modestly because we are still before the midpoint but the opponent has not improved at all from their repeated all-valueE offers. Since they appear to be holding firm, I am continuing to protect my highest-weight issues A and B while making concessions on lower-weight issues and a small concession on issueC to explore possible movement.

I am targeting a utility around 0.76, conceding slightly from my last offer while still protecting the highest-weight issues A and B. I targeted a utility around 0.72, continuing a measured concession path while protecting the highest-weight issues issueA and issueB at valueA. The opponent has held completely firm at all valueE offers with no messages or evidence of concession, and at t=0.32 there is still time, so I concede further mainly on the lower/mid-weight issues rather than capitulating.

I am targeting a utility around 0.26, continuing a controlled concession path while preserving some value on issueA rather than immediately accepting the opponent’s all-valueE position. At t=0.48 we are near mid-negotiation, and the opponent has held completely firm with repeated all-valueE offers and no messages, so I am conceding further but still keeping the bid above my reservation value.

I targeted a utility of 0.20 by matching the opponent’s repeatedly signaled bid, since at t=0.50 they have shown no concession at all and continue offering the same all-valueE package. Although this is only mid-game, my previous concessions have not moved them, so offering their standing bid is the strongest acceptance-oriented move while still beating reservation value.
